nasb.text: Its rising is from one end of the heavens, And its circuit to the other end of them; And there is nothing hidden from its heat.

esv.text: Its rising is from the end of the heavens, and its circuit to the end of them, and there is nothing hidden from its heat.

cnv.text: 它從天的這邊出來， 繞行到天的那邊； 沒有甚麼可以隱藏，得不到它的溫暖。

ccb.text: 它滑过长空， 从天这边绕到天那边， 热量广及万物。

csbs.text: 它从天这边出来，绕到天的那边， 没有什么能在它的热气面前隐藏。
